title: astragalus subternatus
intro: Astragalus subternatus is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is commonly known as the "Mongolian milkvetch" due to its milk-like sap. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus subternatus include reducing the risk of age-related diseases, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus subternatus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote longevity.
